message:
test(installer-e2e): align integration test module with current public API usage

Clean up and stabilize tests/installer_e2e.rs after the large E2E matrix import by removing unused imports and simplifying one bootstrap idempotency scenario to match currently exposed helper functions.

Changes include:

- Trim stale imports from bootstrap, uninstall, wizard, update, and config modules that were not exercised by the test body.

- Replace direct low-level hook-injection/assertion flow with a higher-level bootstrap re-run idempotency check using run_bootstrap, preserving behavioral intent while avoiding dependency on internal helper surfaces.

- Keep test semantics focused on deterministic no-regression behavior rather than private implementation details.
